title: Misfiled Witness Ledger
hypothesis: Misfiled Witness Ledger tests whether archive loss can be felt through irreversible filing decisions instead of decorative particles.
dataModel: seeded parent-child archive strips with variable witness fragments; mutation:custody-shift
recordCountStrategy: seeded variable 10-25 records with no constant-size record array
interactionModel: drag strips between columns; every drop rewrites order, lock state, and localStorage; mutation mode custody-shift
stateModel: localStorage stores recovered, locked, and misfiled record ids for this draft id
visualLanguage: thin ledger strips, hard alignment, damaged text, muted archival paper
expectedStructuralChange: Interaction must change at least one record position, class, label, count, and persisted state.
